description: A login form with email and password fields and submit button built with react
A login form with email and password fields and submit button built with vue
code:
<template>
  <form @submit.prevent="handle" :style="{ maxWidth: '480px', margin: '40px auto', padding: '24px', border: '1px solid #e5e5e5', borderRadius: '8px' }">
    <input v-model="name" placeholder="Name" :style="inputStyle" />
    <input v-model="email" type="email" placeholder="Email" :style="inputStyle" />
    <button type="submit" :style="{ padding: '10px 24px', background: '#111', color: '#fff', border: 'none', borderRadius: '4px', cursor: 'pointer' }">Submit</button>
  </form>
</template>
<script setup lang="ts">
import { ref } from 'vue';
import { createVueMicroApp } from '@tuvix.js/vue';
export default createVueMicroApp({});
const name = ref(''); const email = ref('');
const inputStyle = { display: 'block', width: '100%', padding: '10px', marginBottom: '12px', border: '1px solid #ccc', borderRadius: '4px', boxSizing: 'border-box' };
function handle() { console.log(name.value, email.value); }
</script>

description: A login form with email and password fields and submit button built with svelte
code:
<script>
  import { createSvelteMicroApp } from '@tuvix.js/svelte';
  export const app = createSvelteMicroApp({});
  let name = '', email = '';
  function handle(e) { e.preventDefault(); console.log(name, email); }
</script>
<form on:submit={handle}>
  <input bind:value={name} placeholder="Name" />
  <input bind:value={email} type="email" placeholder="Email" />
  <button type="submit">Submit</button>
</form>
<style>
  form { max-width: 480px; margin: 40px auto; padding: 24px; border: 1px solid #e5e5e5; border-radius: 8px; }
  input { display: block; width: 100%; padding: 10px; margin-bottom: 12px; border: 1px solid #ccc; border-radius: 4px; box-sizing: border-box; }
  button { padding: 10px 24px; background: #111; color: #fff; border: none; border-radius: 4px; cursor: pointer; }
</style>
